pre_existing_findings.summary: [typescript] Electron desktop IPC has compile-time TypeScript types only — no runtime schema validation at the preload boundary
[typescript] Desktop package has only 2 test files for 29 source modules — no IPC handler tests
[typescript] Desktop Electron app has no main-process uncaughtException/unhandledRejection handler

github_remote_parsing.function: parseGitHubRemote() — parses git URLs into {owner, repo}
github_remote_parsing.zero_production_callers: Critical finding: parseGitHubRemote() has zero production callers. Only referenced in a stale test (github-remote.test.ts:2) that imports from a non-existent module path '../../src/cli/cmd/github'

provider_api_surface.note: Contains ProviderID branded type with githubCopilot and gitlab as well-known providers. No GitHub API client exists yet.

repo_clone_tool.note: Existing tool for cloning GitHub repos via RepositoryCache — closest existing GitHub API integration point

github_copilot_plugin.note: 395 lines — handles Copilot auth (device code flow, OAuth token exchange), model URL rewriting, enterprise domain support. Existing GitHub auth flow.

cloudflare_github_app.note: Hono-based Cloudflare Worker with GitHub App token exchange endpoints using @octokit/rest and @octokit/auth-app. Endpoints: POST /exchange_github_app_token, GET /get_github_app_installation

session_pages.note: No PR-related UI exists in any session page. SessionReviewTab shows file diffs only.

test_infrastructure.github_test_file: packages/opencode/test/cli/github-remote.test.ts (91 lines, 12 test cases, all passing — parses various git URL formats to {owner, repo})
test_infrastructure.stale_import_warning: Test imports parseGitHubRemote from '../../src/cli/cmd/github' which does not exist. The function lives in '../../src/util/repository'. Test is likely broken.
test_infrastructure.test_gap: No integration tests for GitHub API, no mock server, no OAuth flow tests

RemoteReference.fields: host, path, segments, owner?, repo, remote, label, protocol?

RepositoryCache types.service_interface: RepositoryCache.Service — Effect service with ensure(), parseRemoteReference(), validateBranch()

dependency_graph.graph_structure: util/repository.ts → reference/repository-cache.ts → reference/reference.ts → tool/*. No circular edges detected.

actual_usage.@octokit/rest: NOT USED IN packages/opencode/src/ — zero imports. Only used in packages/function/src/api.ts:6 (Cloudflare Worker)
actual_usage.@octokit/graphql: NOT USED ANYWHERE — zero imports site-wide
actual_usage.@octokit/webhooks-types: NOT USED ANYWHERE — zero imports site-wide

octokit_dependency_analysis.verdict: Three Octokit packages are declared as dependencies of @opencode-ai/core but are not imported anywhere in the source code. They may be dead dependencies, available for future GitHub API work without adding new dependencies.

oauth_patterns.exists_in_app: packages/app/src/components/dialog-connect-provider.tsx — full OAuth flow UI with OAuthCodeView, OAuthAutoView, OAuthPromptsView components (653 lines)
oauth_patterns.copilot_auth: packages/opencode/src/plugin/github-copilot/copilot.ts — implements device code flow for GitHub Copilot (lines 241+), OAuth token exchange against github.com
oauth_patterns.mcp_oauth: packages/opencode/src/mcp/oauth-provider.ts — PKCE authorization_code flow with local callback server on port 19876
oauth_patterns.mcp_auth_persistence: packages/opencode/src/mcp/auth.ts — Effect service storing OAuth tokens to mcp-auth.json via AppFileSystem
oauth_patterns.canonical_pattern: OAuth in the app uses ProviderAuthMethod/ProviderAuthAuthorization SDK types + DialogConnectProvider component with method selection, API key, OAuth code, and OAuth auto views

api_client_patterns.canonical_pattern: Frontend uses generated SDK client (@opencode-ai/sdk/v2/client) via createSdkForServer(). Backend uses fetch with AbortController or Effect's HttpClient. No axios.

ipc_handler_patterns.registration: registerIpcHandlers(deps: Deps) — all handlers pass through deps object
ipc_handler_patterns.no_runtime_validation: Types only at compile time — no schema validation at preload boundary
ipc_handler_patterns.window_security: contextIsolation: true, nodeIntegration: false, sandbox: true (packages/desktop/src/main/windows.ts:120)

canonical_pattern: 1. Schema types with Schema.Struct / Schema.Class (data models)
3. Interface type with readonly Effect methods (interface)

i18n_patterns.merge_pattern: App dict + UI dict merged per locale
i18n_patterns.loading: en is bundled statically; others lazy-loaded via dynamic import

review_tab.current_capability: Shows file diffs (SnapshotFileDiff | VcsFileDiff), supports split/unified view, line comments, file restore
review_tab.no_pr_ui: No PR creation UI, no branch selection, no commit message input — this is where a 'Create PR' button/pane would go

message_timeline.current_capability: Virtualized timeline of session messages, diffs, tool calls. Has share/unshare session, archive, delete
message_timeline.no_pr_integration: No PR status display, no CI/CD indicators in message timeline — potential integration point

composer.current_capability: Session composer — message input, permission dock, request tree

desktop_menu.no_github_actions: No GitHub-related menu actions — potential 'Create PR', 'View PR status' etc.

copilot_device_code_flow.description: Gets user code via POST to github.com/.../device/code, polls for token, then exchanges for access_token

mcp_oauth_flow.description: PKCE authorization_code flow with @modelcontextprotocol/sdk OAuthClientProvider interface
mcp_oauth_flow.callback_server: packages/opencode/src/mcp/oauth-callback.ts — local HTTP server on port 19876 at /mcp/oauth/callback
mcp_oauth_flow.auth_persistence: packages/opencode/src/mcp/auth.ts — Effect service, file-based JSON at Global.Path.data + 'mcp-auth.json'

core_auth_storage.types: Oauth (access/refresh/expires), Api (key), WellKnown — discriminated union via 'type' field

endpoints: POST /exchange_github_app_token — exchanges OIDC token for GitHub App installation token (uses @octokit/auth-app)
POST /exchange_github_app_token_with_pat — same but with user PAT
GET /get_github_app_installation — checks if GitHub App is installed

auth_patterns.no_github_oauth: No GitHub OAuth app flow exists in the desktop or opencode packages. No GitHub API token storage. The function package has GitHub App auth but that's a Cloudflare Worker, not the desktop app.

existing_ipc_infrastructure.naming_convention: kebab-case for channels, camelCase for bridge methods
existing_ipc_infrastructure.store_pattern: electron-store backed by named stores with RESERVED_STORE_NAMES protection

needed_for_github.purpose: Start GitHub OAuth flow in system browser
Receive OAuth callback with auth code (deep link handler exists — onDeepLink in preload/types.ts)
needed_for_github.existing_infrastructure: onDeepLink already registered — channel 'deep-link' with string[] payload. Can be reused for OAuth callback.

needed_for_github.purpose: Proxy GitHub API requests (avoids CORS from renderer, attaches auth token from main process store)
needed_for_github.pattern: ipcMain.handle('github-api-proxy', (event, {method, path, body}) => fetch(`https://api.github.com${path}`, {method, headers: {Authorization: `Bearer ${token}`}, body}))

needed_for_github.purpose: Get repository info from the detected git remote
needed_for_github.note: local git operations don't need IPC — they use opencode's Git service directly

electron_api_changes.types_file: packages/desktop/src/preload/types.ts — ElectronAPI type needs new methods (githubGetToken? etc.)
electron_api_changes.bridge_file: packages/desktop/src/preload/index.ts — contextBridge needs new method mappings

i18n_en_ts.risk: Adding GitHub UI strings requires adding to all 16 locale files
ocr_hotspots: provider.auth.* — 11 OAuth-related keys per locale (reusable pattern)
dialog.* — dialog namespace for new GitHub dialogs
i18n_en_ts.recommendation: Use existing provider.auth.* pattern namespace for GitHub auth strings; create github.* namespace for GitHub-specific UI

desktop_menu_ts.risk: Adding GitHub menu items requires new DesktopMenuAction types and entries in DESKTOP_MENU

ipc_types_ts.risk: High contention file — ElectronAPI type modified by multiple sessions recently (MCP, agents, plugins). Multiple parallel editors risk merge conflicts.

already_modeled.remote_parsing: parseGitHubRemote() → {owner, repo} for any git URL format (zero production callers — dead code)
already_modeled.repo_clone: repo_clone tool with RepositoryCache (clone, fetch, checkout, refresh)
already_modeled.reference_resolution: Reference service resolves git references from config
already_modeled.copilot_auth: GitHub Copilot auth plugin with device code flow and token management
already_modeled.provider_registry: githubCopilot provider ID in ProviderID schema
already_modeled.oauth_flow_ui: Full OAuth flow UI in dialog-connect-provider.tsx (reusable pattern for GitHub OAuth)
already_modeled.mcp_oauth: PKCE OAuth with callback server — pattern reusable for GitHub OAuth callback handling
already_modeled.account_management: AuthSet/AuthRemove API endpoints for account credential management
already_modeled.deep_link_handler: onDeepLink IPC channel — reusable for GitHub OAuth callback via custom URL scheme
already_modeled.vcs_types: VcsInfo, VcsFileDiff, VcsFileStatus in SDK types
already_modeled.github_app_token_exchange: packages/function/src/api.ts — Cloudflare Worker with Octokit for GitHub App token exchange

octokit_dependencies_available.@octokit/rest: declared but NOT imported in source — available for GitHub API work without package.json change
octokit_dependencies_available.@octokit/graphql: declared but NOT imported — available for GraphQL API work
octokit_dependencies_available.@octokit/webhooks-types: declared but NOT imported — available for webhook event type definitions

not_yet_modeled_but_needed: GitHub OAuth app flow (client ID, redirect URI, token exchange)
GitHub API client initialization from stored token
Commit message and branch name input UI
CI/CD status polling (check runs, statuses via @octokit/rest)
PR review workflow (comment, approve, request changes)
Git workflow interop (create branch, push branch, status checks)
PR list view in desktop sidebar

smoking_guns.summary: parseGitHubRemote() has zero production callers — the function is dead code. Test imports from a non-existent module path
smoking_guns.impact: The core GitHub URL parsing logic is effectively untested and unused. Any architect relying on it must verify it works first.

smoking_guns.summary: No PR creation code exists anywhere — not even type definitions for PR creation
smoking_guns.impact: PR management lane involves greenfield development across all layers (types, API calls, UI, IPC)

smoking_guns.summary: @octokit/rest, @octokit/graphql, and @octokit/webhooks-types are declared dependencies but NOT imported anywhere in packages/opencode/src/. They may be dead dependencies.
smoking_guns.impact: These can be reused for GitHub API work without adding new dependencies, but their presence in package.json may be accidental or for future use.

smoking_guns.summary: Cloudflare Function (packages/function/src/api.ts) has the only working Octokit integration — for GitHub App token exchange in CI context, not desktop
smoking_guns.impact: The existing GitHub API code is in a serverless function, not the desktop app. The Octokit auth patterns used there (createAppAuth) are specific to GitHub App installation tokens, not user OAuth tokens.

smoking_guns.summary: Desktop IPC has no runtime schema validation — preload types are compile-time only
smoking_guns.impact: Adding GitHub OAuth token handling IPC channels increases security surface. Pre-existing finding.

smoking_guns.summary: i18n/en.ts has 1020 lines with 16 locale mirror files — every GitHub UI string addition requires 17-file update
smoking_guns.impact: Design i18n strategy early. Recommend namespacing under 'github.*'

smoking_guns.summary: Desktop package has only 2 test files for 29 source modules — new IPC handlers won't have test coverage
smoking_guns.impact: New GitHub IPC handlers need test coverage built from scratch

smoking_guns.summary: No uncaughtException handler in desktop Electron main process — OAuth callback errors could cause silent crashes
smoking_guns.impact: Pre-existing finding. GitHub OAuth callback handlers need explicit error resilience.

smoking_guns.summary: The deep-link IPC channel (onDeepLink) already exists and receives URL callbacks — can be reused for GitHub OAuth redirect without adding a new event type
smoking_guns.impact: Opportunity: reuse existing deep link infrastructure for GitHub OAuth callback URLs (opencode://github-oauth/callback?...)
